svg.title: The /advisor command in Claude Code
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the /advisor setup flow and the dual-model executor/advisor loop in Claude Code. Sonnet handles execution; Opus is consulted at trigger points mid-task.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the 4 trigger conditions that cause the advisor to be called in Claude Code?')
sendPrompt('How does advisor() get called silently mid-response in Claude Code?')
sendPrompt('What happens when Sonnet resumes after the advisor responds in Claude Code?')
sendPrompt('Why does Claude Code call the advisor again before declaring a task complete?')
sendPrompt('What does the full transcript contain when sent to Opus as advisor?')
sendPrompt('How many tokens does the Opus advisor typically generate and what does it cost?')
sendPrompt('What does the advisor_tool_result block contain and how does Sonnet use it?')
